title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 246.080 - Limitation on tax anticipation warrants
text:
246.080.  Limitation on tax anticipation warrants. — Tax anticipation warrants may be issued and sold or exchanged for or in payment of machinery, draglines, equipment or work used in maintenance and chargeable to maintenance; provided, that in no event shall the tax anticipation warrants so issued, together with interest thereon, exceed two and one-half percent of the assessed benefits for any year falling due.
(RSMo 1939 § 12614) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 11025
